name: Murat Yilmaz
title: Senior Property Consultant
bio: Murat brings five years of high-end residential and commercial leasing experience in Bahrain's most competitive districts. Originally from Istanbul, he specializes in matching expat executives with premium Juffair and Seef towers, with deep knowledge of every newly delivered building.

name: Hassan Al Mahmood
title: Property Consultant
bio: Hassan is the IRE specialist for Bahrain's waterfront and island communities. With three years brokering Amwaj villas and Bahrain Bay penthouses, he understands the lifestyle expectations of every buyer who walks through his doors.

name: Fatima Al Doseri
title: Senior Leasing Consultant
bio: Fatima has spent seven years building IRE's family-villa portfolio across Riffa and Saar. Bahraini-born and a parent herself, she understands what families need from a home — from school catchments to garden orientations.

name: Ali Karimi
title: Commercial Property Specialist
bio: Ali leads IRE's commercial leasing desk, with a focus on Diplomatic Area and Seef office towers. Four years advising banks, embassies, and multinational tenants on flexible workspace and prestige addresses.

name: Sarah Williams
title: Luxury Property Specialist
bio: Sarah brings two years of trophy-property experience to IRE's Bahrain Bay and Reef Island portfolio. British-born and Cannes-trained, she advises high-net-worth individuals on Bahrain's most exclusive new addresses.

name: Ahmed Al Khalifa
title: Branch Manager
bio: Ahmed has led IRE's Bahrain office for a decade, growing the team from a handful of consultants to one of the kingdom's most respected agencies. Direct line for institutional clients and complex transactions.
